markdownRemark.html:
A collection of interesting things I’ve discovered this month:

  • ASP.NET Core CSRF defence with Antiforgery
  • AsyncAPI Initiative - “the industry standard for defining asynchronous APIs”
  • Nerd Fonts - “Iconic font aggregator, collection, and patcher”
